title: euonymus rehderianus
intro: Euonymus rehderianus, also known as Chinese spindle tree or Chinese strawberry tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Euonymus rehderianus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulations, such as granules or capsules.
